haitian_creole.for_pm_times_after_noon_subtract_12_fr: Pou lè PM apre midi, retire 12 nan lè a.
haitian_creole.for_am_times_the_hour_stays_the_same: Pou lè AM yo, lè a rete menm jan an.
haitian_creole.move_one_representation_and_watch_anal: Deplase yon reprezantasyon epi gade kijan lè analojik la, lè 12 èdtan an ak lè 24 èdtan an rete konekte.
haitian_creole.break_an_interval_into_friendly_jumps_: Divize yon entèval an so ki fasil jouk nan lè egzat la, epi konbine so yo.
haitian_creole.elapsed_time_jump_timeline: Liy tan ki pase ak so
haitian_creole.the_interval_is_zero_so_start_and_end_: Entèval la se zewo, donk kòmansman an ak fen an se menm bagay la.
haitian_creole.use_24_hour_form_such_as_13_25: Sèvi ak fòm 24 èdtan an, tankou 13:25.
haitian_creole.use_12_hour_form_with_am_or_pm: Sèvi ak fòm 12 èdtan an ak AM oswa PM.
haitian_creole.enter_a_time_such_as_13_25_or_1_25_pm: Antre yon lè, tankou 13:25 oswa 1:25 PM.
haitian_creole.enter_minutes_or_a_duration_such_as_1_: Antre minit oswa yon dire, tankou 1 h 15 min.
haitian_creole.not_yet_draw_jumps_between_the_two_tim: Poko. Desine so ant de lè yo epi eseye ankò.
haitian_creole.compare_event_lengths_free_time_gaps_a: Konpare dire evènman yo, espas tan lib yo, ak longè yon plan antye.
haitian_creole.mark_both_times_on_a_number_line_jump_: Make de lè yo sou yon liy nonm. Sote jouk yon lè egzat ki fasil, ajoute èdtan konplè yo, epi fini ak minit ki rete yo.
haitian_creole.use_24_hour_form_such_as_18_40: Sèvi ak fòm 24 èdtan an, tankou 18:40.
haitian_creole.enter_a_time_such_as_18_40_or_6_40_pm: Antre yon lè, tankou 18:40 oswa 6:40 PM.
haitian_creole.enter_minutes_or_a_duration_such_as_2_: Antre minit oswa yon dire, tankou 2 h 15 min.
haitian_creole.not_yet_use_a_clock_timeline_or_minute: Poko. Sèvi ak yon revèy, yon liy tan, oswa minit apre minwi.
haitian_creole.moving_to_another_missed_challenge: N ap pase nan yon lòt defi ki rate.
haitian_creole.retry_set_complete_returning_to_all_ch: Seri repetisyon an fini. N ap retounen nan tout defi yo.
haitian_creole.a_stable_deterministic_practice_set_wi: Yon seri pratik ki estab e detèministik ak nivo difikilte epi yon ranje espesyal pou reeseye sa ki rate yo.
haitian_creole.solved_currently_viewing_challenge: rezoud; defi w ap gade kounye a
haitian_creole.find_an_exact_clock_time: Jwenn yon lè egzak revèy la.
haitian_creole.durations_may_be_entered_in_total_minu: Ou ka antre dire yo an minit total oswa an èdtan ak minit.
haitian_creole.use_two_digit_24_hour_form_hh_mm: Sèvi ak fòm 24 èdtan ak de chif (HH:MM).
haitian_creole.you_may_use_either_12_hour_or_24_hour_: Ou ka sèvi ak fòm 12 èdtan an oswa fòm 24 èdtan an.
haitian_creole.draw_jumps_to_a_friendly_hour: Desine so jouk yon lè egzat ki fasil.
haitian_creole.convert_each_time_to_minutes_after_mid: Konvèti chak lè an minit apre minwi.
haitian_creole.for_a_missing_start_count_backward_fro: Si lè kòmansman an manke, konte pou dèyè apati fen an.
haitian_creole.crossing_midnight_begins_a_new_24_hour: Pase minwi kòmanse yon nouvo sik 24 èdtan.
haitian_creole.see_time_count_time_plan_time_and_expl: Wè tan, konte tan, planifye tan, epi eksplike estrateji ou.
haitian_creole.a_clock_time_and_an_amount_of_time_are: Yon lè revèy ak yon kantite tan se de grandè diferan. Ekri inite yo ak dire yo.
haitian_creole.no_timer_pressure_keyboard_friendly_te: Pa gen presyon kwonomèt · fasil ak klavye · altènatif tèks enkli
